description: Unofficial MCP server for Karbon practice management: contacts, work, time, invoices, payments.
name: io.github.Mad-Man-Dan/karbon-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token (Application Authorization Token) from Karbon → Settings → Connected Apps → API Applications
environmentVariables.name: KARBON_BEARER_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Access key (JWT starting with 'ey') from Karbon → Settings → Connected Apps → API Applications
environmentVariables.name: KARBON_ACCESS_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to disable all create/update tools (they are not registered at all)
environmentVariables.name: KARBON_READ_ONLY

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable the payment write tools (create/delete/reverse manual payments); off by default
environmentVariables.name: KARBON_ALLOW_PAYMENT_WRITES
